about.short_description: I am a professional with experience in the area, graduated in Internet Systems from Centro Universitário SENAC, capable of developing projects as a team and easily adapting to changes.

about.title: About
about.complete_description:
Technologist in Internet Systems with ten years of experience in the field,
I have expertise as a Fullstack Developer. I have a comprehensive knowledge
of open-source languages and technologies, such as PHP, JavaScript, and more.

🎓 Getting ready to start a postgraduate degree in Software Architecture.

📖 Studying extensively TypeScript and frameworks like Next.js, Expo, and Nest.js.

🧑‍💼 Currently seeking new job opportunities.

Educational Background

Jul. 2012 - Dec. 2015

In 2012, I began my studies in Internet Systems at the Senac University Center. Throughout all the semesters, I completed an integrative project, totaling five projects:
A Landing Page, an e-commerce website, a PHP API, an Android App, and a Dashboard.
The first semester was where I learned to program using algorithmic language and had my first introduction to HTML5, CSS, and JavaScript. In the second semester, I learned C# and Java with Object-Oriented Programming, as well as how to create an e-commerce website using the .NET framework. In the third semester, I learned PHP and was introduced to information security. In the fourth semester, I delved deeper into Java, creating Servlets, and also learned to create Android Apps using the Eclipse IDE. The final semester was where I worked with the Laravel framework and also created a Dashboard using the Angular framework.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.complete_description:
Feb 2018 - Oct 2018

From February 2018 to October 2018, I was a Front-end Developer at 123Carros, São Paulo, Brazil.
During this period, I was responsible for the frontend development of the Marketplace, I worked with technologies such as JQuery, Git, Laravel, SASS and PHP.

- Conducted meetings with the development team to align projects.
- I worked on the development of the platform initially called Vendi and later renamed to 123Carros.
- Acted as technical leader of the frontend development team, assisting the developers below and assigning work.
- I worked on the development of the platform's frontend using the technologies mentioned above.
- I worked on developing a blog for the platform using WordPress.

Nov 2017 - Sep 2018

From November 2017, I returned to working from home as a freelancer, where I worked as a Frontend Developer in partnership with Agencia WebSide.
where I was responsible for the frontend development of projects. I continued working with technologies such as JQuery, Git, HTML5, CSS.

- Conducted meetings with the development team to align projects.
- Estimated project development time together with the development team.
- I worked on the development of the frontend of websites and landing pages, using the technologies mentioned above.
- I worked on developing email marketing pieces.

Sep 2018 - Dec 2018

In September 2018 and until December 2018, I worked as a Fullstack Developer at Agência Shape Web, Campo Grande, Mato Grosso do Sul, Brazil.
I worked with MySQL, JQuery, Javascript, Git, SASS, PHP and HTML5.

- I passed a practical test for fullstack php developer.
- Conducted meetings with the development team to align projects.
- Estimated project development time together with the development team.
- I worked on the fullstack development of websites and landing pages and also an ecommerce platform, using the technologies mentioned above.

Feb 2019 - March 2018

In 2019, I returned to live in São Paulo, spent two months as a Fullstack Developer at Agência 3xceler, São Paulo, Brazil,
where I worked with Stylus, MySQL, JQuery, Git, PHP, HTML5 and WordPress.

- I passed a practical test for fullstack php developer.
- Conducted meetings with the development team to align projects.
- I worked on the fullstack development of two complete websites using CMS Wordpress.

Mar 2019 - Apr 2020

Between March 2019 and April 2020, I worked as a Front-end Developer at Zebra Deluxe Comunicação, São Paulo, Brazil.
During this period, I worked with MySQL, JQuery, Laravel, SASS, WordPress and JavaScript.

- I passed a practical test for full stack developer.
- Performed Daily Scrum with the development team to align projects.
- Estimated project development time together with the development team.
- I worked on hiring new developers.
- Acted as technical leader of the frontend development team, assisting the developers below and assigning work.
- I worked on the development of websites and web systems, using the technologies mentioned above.
- I worked on the development of landing pages and hotsites.
- Also carried out maintenance on existing websites and systems.
- Developed email marketing pieces.

Mar 2020 - Dec 2020

In March 2020, I started my work at Interaktiv, where I worked as a Fullstack Developer.
In June of the same year, Interaktiv underwent a merger and acquisition by the Brazilian multinational CTC.
I worked with technologies such as Linux, Docker, Git, CakePHP, Laravel, WordPress, Vue.js and JavaScript.

- I passed a practical test for full stack developer.
- Performed Daily Scrum with the development team to align projects.
- Performed Scrum Planning with the development team to align projects once a month.
- Managed Tickets created by customers.
- Registered all hours spent (on tickets or internal demands) carried out on the interaktiv platform.
- I worked on the development of websites and web systems, using the technologies mentioned above.
- Also carried out maintenance on existing websites and systems.

Jan 2021 - Feb 2021

In January 2022, after a referral, I started freelance work for the client Ferraz e Fonseca Odontologia.
Where I worked on the entire construction of the company's institutional website using CMS Wordpress.

- Conducted meetings with the client to align projects.
- I worked on the development of the frontend and backend of the website using CMS Wordpress.
- I worked on the development of banners and page layout using photoshop.
- Versioned the site using git and github.
- I deployed the website using cpanel.

Mar 2021 - Jun 2021

In March 2022, after another recommendation, I started freelance work for CBC Agronegócios. During this period I worked on several adjustments to the company's institutional website with CMS Wordpress.

- Conducted meetings with the client to align projects.
- I worked on the development of the frontend and backend of the website for some parts of the website
- I worked on improving performance and optimizing the project
- Developed new pages and maintained old pages
- I configured the website's SEO plugin and SSL certificate
- Made several updates to the site's legacy theme

Aug 2021 - Nov 2021

In August 2022, after another recommendation, I started a new freelance job for Agencia LayerUp.
During this period I worked on two company projects with CMS Wordpress.

- Conducted meetings with the client to align projects.
- Used Git to version the project.
- I worked on the development of the frontend and complete backend of a landing page. (geradev)
- I worked on the development of the frontend and complete backend of a blog. (playcenter)
- I worked on deploying projects using cpanel.

I started 2022 working at Meeta Solutions, where I was hired as a PJ in a hybrid model in the role of Fullstack Developer.
